hypotheses.name: TwoNN intrinsic dimensionality per layer
hypotheses.method: TwoNN estimator on PCA-20 projections of 400 sampled scGPT gene embeddings, 12 layers, seed42; 15 feature-shuffle null replicates.
hypotheses.next_action: Test ID monotonicity across all 3 seeds; compare Euclidean vs PCA ID; run MADA as cross-check

hypotheses.name: TRRUST co-target distance clustering (random-group null)
hypotheses.method: Mean pairwise dist for co-targets of 64 TFs (>=5 mapped targets each) vs 20 random-same-size groups from gene pool; 12 layers, seed42.
hypotheses.next_action: If positive: test across multiple seeds and compare to GO-term null; if negative: try cosine similarity instead of Euclidean dist

hypotheses.name: Cross-layer linear CKA alignment
hypotheses.method: Linear CKA on PCA-20 projections of 400 sampled gene embeddings; all 12x12 layer pairs, seed42; 15 feature-shuffle null replicates for layer0 row.
hypotheses.next_action: If positive: compare CKA gradient across depth as signal for representation drift; compare to Geneformer layer CKA if embeddings become available
